items.name: Arm Swing Dance 🐕
items.description:
[NEW EMOTE UNLOCKED: ARM SWING DANCE]

Congratulations! You’ve learned how to weaponize your complete lack of rhythm. The Arm Swing is a dance move of such primal chaos that it looks like you’re trying to punch every ghost in the room at once. Arms flail in wide, reckless arcs, threatening to clip allies, enemies, and possibly the very concept of dignity. While technically a "dance," witnesses frequently mistake it for a medical emergency.

WARNING: Use of this emote in confined spaces may result in collateral damage, loss of friendships, or accidental initiation of mating rituals with nearby fauna.

https://www.roblox.com/communities/156057095/AnimDawgs#!/store
